title: crotalaria heidmannii
intro: Crotalaria heidmannii, also known as Heidmann's rattle box or crotalaria, is a plant species in the legume family native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. Its health benefits include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as exhibiting antiparasitic properties. Crotalaria heidmannii is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and is used in various herbal preparations to promote healing and alleviate symptoms.
